title: Gettiarn Space Station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gettiarn Space Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Iotran system]] which orbited [[Gettiarn]]. It was a rigidly-controlled complex where all non-Iotran traffic into the system was routed.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-10-XX -->[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
